name: Threshold Hall of Ashforge
approach: Doorway lintels, gift racks, and carved threshold ledgers make it immediately clear that household acceptance has public and political weight here.
inside: Gift tables, vow stones, and dispute benches turn private threshold custom into visible civic practice.
expected_behavior: bow at the threshold when custom requires
allow household authority to speak first in threshold disputes
economy_or_function: threshold custom adjudication and vow witnessing
